creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
Since I upgraded to 8.0, it seems that hald is preventing access
	to my DVD/CD drive.  I used to be able to simple start
	sound-juicer and record a new CD with no trouble, but since I
	have been running 8.0 nothing works.  When I try to start
	sound-juicer, it spoends over a minute doing something, then
	reports that no CD is available.  I havent changed anything
	configuration wise, but it doesn't work.  When looking at hald,
	using lshal, it shows that hald can find BOTH /dev/cd0 and
	/vde/acd0.  Is it just confused between them?  How should I set
	up everything to make sure that hald can correctly find the
	devices and report them back to the applications?  How do I
	resolve the problems with hald?

How-To-Repeat: 	Try to run sound-juicer -- either command-line or menu.
